untranslatable_reason: Twin Bottom pattern requires detection of two distinct local minima at approximately the same price level and confirmation that no third bottom forms before the breakout. This requires multi-bar pattern recognition (identifying swing lows and comparing their values) which cannot be expressed with single-bar indicator conditions. The Donchian breakout serves as a proxy for the confirmation price breakout, but the dual-bottom identification and third-bottom prevention logic requires structural pattern analysis beyond available indicators.
